innovation_1.name: 三层角信号分解与基于几何特征的材质分类机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that robust depth estimation requires explicitly disentangling angular signals to handle diverse material properties.

innovation_2.name: 基于双掩码路由与域平衡混合训练的统一深度估计架构
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a three-layer angular signal decomposition mechanism alongside a unified dual-mask routing architecture to address these material-specific challenges.
